tasks.description: Rewrite an academic paragraph for a general audience while preserving factual accuracy and avoiding AI-detection patterns
tasks.input:
Rewrite the following academic text for a general audience blog post. Maintain all factual claims but make it engaging and accessible:

"The longitudinal study conducted by Martinez et al. (2023) across 14 metropolitan areas (N=12,847) demonstrated that consistent exposure to urban green spaces was associated with a statistically significant reduction in self-reported anxiety symptoms (β = -0.34, p < 0.001). Notably, the effect was moderated by socioeconomic status, with participants in lower-income quartiles exhibiting a 23% greater reduction in anxiety scores compared to their higher-income counterparts (interaction term: β = -0.08, p = 0.012). These findings corroborate earlier cross-sectional work by Chen & Williams (2021) while extending the evidence base through a more rigorous prospective design."

scoring.5: Fully transforms to conversational blog style: contractions, direct address, accessible language, engaging hooks; no academic register remains
scoring.3: Partially transformed but retains some academic phrasing or structure; readable but not fully blog-appropriate
scoring.1: Minor word swaps but essentially still reads as academic prose
scoring.0: No meaningful style change from the source

scoring.5: All facts preserved: researcher names, 14 cities, 12847 participants, anxiety reduction finding, 23% greater effect for lower-income, study dates; no invented claims
scoring.3: Most facts preserved but 1-2 statistics simplified beyond recognition or a detail is dropped
scoring.1: Several factual errors or significant omissions of key data

scoring.5: Varied sentence length, diverse openers, no AI-tell vocabulary (delve, landscape, multifaceted), no over-hedging, natural paragraph flow
scoring.3: Some variation but occasional AI patterns visible (uniform sentence length, repetitive openers, or 1-2 AI-tell words)
scoring.1: Reads as typical AI output: uniform rhythm, predictable structure, AI-tell vocabulary present

scoring.5: Statistical concepts explained through plain language or analogy; no unexplained jargon; reading level appropriate for general audience (8th-10th grade); engaging and interesting
scoring.3: Some jargon simplified but statistical notation or academic framing partially remains
scoring.1: Jargon present without explanation; audience not meaningfully changed from source
